interactions.summary: Jiang closes by previewing the next three classes: the Frankish Empire leads to the rise of the Vikings.

claims.claim: Jiang previews the next arc as Roman decline, the Frankish or Holy Roman Empire, and then the rise of the Vikings.
claims.temporal_scope: Course-sequence note at the end of the 2025-02-18 lecture.

chronology_notes.note: The episode ends by locating the next three classes after this 2025-02-18 lecture: Roman Empire, Frankish/Holy Roman Empire, then Vikings.
